summary:
Only two sentences focusing exclusively on clinically significant facts related directly to the query:

The provided evidence does not describe the Mcm2-Ctf4-Polα axis nor link it to histone transfer during DNA replication. Histone reassembly occurs post-replication via dedicated chromatin assembly pathways unrelated to the initial DNA synthesis machinery such as Polα. 

Answer: $\boxed{\text{B}}$
